headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (only if future disclosure lapses occur) — Adani Power faces routine investor scrutiny ahead of Q4 results with minor ESG disclosure implications.
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, TCFD triggered; no new deadlines or penalties announced.
No current P/E compression or revenue at risk; only long-term effects if disclosure weakens.
No immediate impact; minor potential for cost of capital increase (20-40bps) if disclosures lag.
